title: Account for every evidence state
description: Represent supported, unavailable, insufficient, and deferred analytical outcomes explicitly at metric or signal scope while distinguishing whole-report failures. Goal trace: G2 and G3.
rationale: Zeros, omitted fields, and generic failures would conceal why an insight is absent or unsafe.
story_want: see why every requested metric or signal is present or absent
story_so_that: missing evidence cannot become invented confidence
acceptance_criteria: Given a requested metric or signal kind, when a complete report is returned, then exactly one Supported, Unavailable, Insufficient Evidence, Not Started, or Deferred state accounts for it.

Given No Budget Plan, No Active Budget Plan Revision, Unsupported Policy, Insufficient Horizon, Incomplete Coverage, Incomparable Baseline, or Not Started, when the state is returned, then the reason is a stable typed value with cited evidence and policy version.
Given an unavailable or insufficient derived signal, when exact metrics remain supported, then the complete report preserves those exact metrics and records the signal-local state.
Given a signal-local unavailable state, when amounts are inspected, then zero, baseline, confidence, or severity values are absent unless zero is the exact supported observed metric.
Given cross-source incoherence, contract incompatibility, integrity failure, exact-arithmetic failure, or incomplete pagination, when generation is attempted, then no Insight Report is returned.
Given multiple requested kinds, when report accounting is inspected, then every kind appears exactly once in deterministic catalogue order and no unsupported kind disappears silently.
